summary: Completed Phase 3 Audit testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all critical features: Matrix cells with has_actual/actual/planned fields, Total NM column, actual input dialog with carry forward/write off buttons, 'A' indicator for actuals, FlowEditor as canonical editor for both matrix row click and Entry Log edit, all 3 tabs rendering correctly, and undo button working.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings (-1) during tab switching - non-blocking, cosmetic only

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with cleanup fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Audit complete. All features verified: 1) Matrix cells have has_actual, actual, planned fields - when actual is recorded, cell shows actual value with 'A' superscript indicator. 2) Matrix net_per_month EXACTLY matches projection months.net (tested for 12M and 24M horizons). 3) PUT /api/flow-occurrences with carry_forward creates carryover flow in next month with variance amount. 4) PUT /api/flow-occurrences with write_off does NOT create carryover. 5) DELETE /api/flow-occurrences clears actual and removes carryover. 6) Projection uses actual_amount when recorded (replaces planned). 7) Undo works for create, edit, delete, batch_create. 8) No legacy paid/unpaid status logic - only variance_action (carry_forward/write_off). 9) expand_recurring_flows no longer accepts unpaid_set parameter. 10) FlowEditor is canonical editor used by both CashFlowTable (row click) and EntryLogPage (edit button). 11) Total NM column shows row totals. 12) Actual input dialog shows planned amount, variance when different, and carry forward/write off buttons.
passed_tests: Backend: Matrix cells have has_actual field
Backend: Matrix cells show actual and planned fields when actual is recorded
Backend: Matrix net_per_month EXACTLY matches projection months.net (12M)
Backend: Matrix net_per_month EXACTLY matches projection months.net (24M)
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with carry_forward creates carryover flow
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with write_off does NOT create carryover
Backend: DELETE /api/flow-occurrences clears actual and removes carryover
Backend: Projection uses actual_amount when recorded (replaces planned)
Backend: Undo create works
Backend: Undo edit works
Backend: Undo delete works
Backend: Undo batch_create works
Backend: No legacy status field in flow_occurrences
Backend: No legacy status field in month_details
Backend: Projection works without unpaid_set parameter
Backend: Matrix works without unpaid_set parameter
Backend: All API endpoints exist and return 200
Frontend: All 3 tabs (Projection, Cash Flow Table, Entries) render correctly
Frontend: Cash Flow Table has Total 12M column on right side
Frontend: Clicking matrix cell opens actual input dialog with planned/actual info
Frontend: Actual input dialog has carry forward and write off buttons when variance exists
Frontend: Variance amount displayed in dialog (e.g., 'Variance: CHF 200.00 (under)')
Frontend: Matrix row label click opens full canonical FlowEditor
Frontend: FlowEditor has all fields: description, entity, amount, date, category, certainty, recurrence, mode, count
Frontend: Entry Log tab uses FlowEditor for editing
Frontend: Quick Add form has recurrence field in main form
Frontend: Undo button visible in header and works

matrix_cells_with_actuals.details: Matrix cells have has_actual, actual, planned fields. When actual is recorded, cell shows actual value with cyan 'A' superscript indicator.

matrix_net_matches_projection.details: Matrix net_per_month values EXACTLY match projection months.net values. Tested for 12M and 24M horizons with no mismatches.

record_actual_carry_forward.details: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with carry_forward creates carryover flow in next month. Variance = planned - actual.

record_actual_write_off.details: PUT /api/flow-occurrences with write_off does NOT create carryover. Variance is ignored.

delete_occurrence_clears_actual.details: DELETE /api/flow-occurrences clears actual and removes any associated carryover flow.

actual_replaces_planned_in_projection.details: Projection engine uses actual_amount when recorded, replacing planned amount in calculations.

undo_system.details: Undo works for create (deletes flow), edit (restores previous values), delete (restores flow), batch_create (removes all created flows).

no_legacy_paid_unpaid_status.details: No legacy 'status' field in flow_occurrences or month_details. Only variance_action (carry_forward/write_off) is used.

canonical_flow_editor.details: FlowEditor.jsx is the single canonical editor used by CashFlowTable (row click) and EntryLogPage (edit button). Has all fields: description, entity, amount, date, category, certainty, recurrence, mode, count, linked flows.

total_nm_column.details: Cash Flow Table has Total 12M/24M/36M column on right side showing row totals.

actual_input_dialog.details: Clicking matrix cell opens actual input dialog showing planned amount, actual input field, variance display when different, and carry forward/write off buttons.
